name: "Feedback — Gap"
about: "I needed context that wasn't in the kit. Help us add what's missing."
title: "feedback:gap — <one-line summary>"
labels: ["feedback", "feedback:gap"]
---

## What you were trying to do
The task that needed context the kit didn't provide.

## What was missing
Specifically — a command, a discipline rule, a file pointer, a piece of business context.

## How you got around it
Asked Johnny? Read source? Guessed? Skipped the task? Tell us so we know how high-severity the gap was.

## Proposed addition
Where should the missing context live, and roughly what should it say?

- [ ] A new section in `CONTRIBUTOR_QUICKSTART.md`
- [ ] A new section in `docs/SESSION-PLAYBOOK.md`
- [ ] A new entry in `LESSONS_LEARNED.md`
- [ ] Update `claude-files/CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] A new doc under `docs/`
- [ ] Other: <suggest>

Sketch the wording if you can.

## Notes (optional)
